CustomField.description: For use with Lottery Reporting TASK0198615. University Credit amount given by this donor for the year normally used to calculate a donor's football apps ( Football Season year minus 2). The year of giving for this amount is in field "Year of Current Calendar Year Credit -10"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: University Credit amount given by this donor for the year normally used to calculate a donor's football apps ( Football Season year minus 2). The year of giving for this amount is in field "Year of Current Calendar Year Credit -10"
CustomField.label: Current Calendar Year Credit -10
